meta-description: Learn about pre-existing condition exclusion periods for individual policies by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary."
title: Pre-existing condition exclusion period (individual policy)
excerpt: The time period during which an individual policy won't pay for care relating to a pre-existing condition. Under an individual policy, conditions may be excluded permanently (known as an "exclusionary rider"). Rules on pre-existing condition exclusion periods in individual policies vary widely by state.
meta-title: Pre-existing condition exclusion period (individual policy) - Glossary
